ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipts For Purchase, Per Court Order Dated February 14, 2008
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Off Calendar

CROSC DISPOSITION
Off Calendar Nov-23-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Marilyn Minger, Esq. for Petitioner: Ann King, present as Guardian at litem for: Darnell Lopez-Kendrick, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined;
John H. Aspelin, Esq. for Petitioner Gloria Lee present as Guardian as litum for Lisa Kendrick and Kala Jones

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
for LISA KENDRICK AND KALA JONES BY John Aspelin, Esq.
Attorney's Fees for $47,459.60
Lien Claim $1,687.50
Costs $10,549.53
Annuity $79,749.96
A net balance of $13,481.74 to be depositted into a blocked account with Washintgon Mutual Bank, Antioch, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order for Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
Compromise for DARNELL LOPEZ-KENDRICK by MARILYN MINGER, ESQ.
Attorney's Fees for $47,459.60
Total Costs $ 10,549.53
Structured settlement $ 85,919.20
A net balance of $9,000.00 to be depositted into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, San Bruno, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
